style_preamble: original retro gross-out satirical trading card, sticker-card composition, die-cut border, gritty ink texture, bold nameplate, comic grotesque goblin character, social systems satire, conceptual visual metaphor, no real person, no brand logos, no copyrighted characters
negative_prompt: photorealistic, real celebrity, real politician, copyrighted character, brand logo, clean corporate clipart, gore, hate symbols, explicit violence, text-heavy poster

cards.title: Signal Sally
cards.one_liner: Spent everything to look credible. Almost worked.
cards.prompt: Signal Sally stands proudly wearing an enormous extravagant peacock-tail display made of money. Each feather is a dollar bill, laminated and pinned. The tail reads HIGH SIGNAL in gold letters. Behind her, a smaller goblin with a paper tail and crayon TRUST sign mimics her, but the fake tail is falling apart. Sally looks triumphant while sweating hard. A tiny imp holds a receipt labeled Life Savings: $1, Trust Gained: $0.50. Another imp sells cheaper tails labeled Reputation Store Brand with a SALE sign. Reputation Gold border with dark scumline.

cards.title: Credibility Carl
cards.one_liner: Trusted by someone who trusted someone who guessed.
cards.prompt: Credibility Carl stands at the end of a fragile trust-chain made of thin threads. At the start, Goblin A shrugs beside a sign saying I don't actually know her. Goblin B passes a nod. Goblin C nods harder. Goblin D signs a contract based entirely on the chain. Carl proudly holds the signed contract. A tiny imp at the first link whispers I'm just guessing while the final link stamps Trusted via Referral with huge confidence. The first link reads Trust: Pending, the final link reads Trust: Confirmed. Reputation Gold border with trust-chain overlay.

cards.title: Status Stanley
cards.one_liner: I'm not important. My connections are.
cards.prompt: Status Stanley sits at the center of an endorsement network. Many arrows point to him from influential-looking goblins, but Stanley has no actual content or authority. His podium is labeled Influential and is clearly borrowed. A small throne behind him is marked Rental with a price tag. Some arrows point away and fade, making the borrowed podium wobble. A tiny imp points to a sign reading My Connections Are Important while another imp erases one arrow and watches Stanley panic. Reputation Gold border, social network diagram background.

cards.title: Gossip Greta
cards.one_liner: I heard it from someone who heard it from someone else.
cards.prompt: Gossip Greta stands at the center of a telephone-game whisper chain. The word RELIABLE enters the first ear and mutates across goblins into Pliable, then Liable, then Evil by the final ear. Greta proudly announces gossip with a megaphone. A tiny imp at each node adds a distortion layer. At the final node, the word EVIL is surrounded by candles and a tiny Verified stamp. Another imp keeps a Mutation Log with timestamps. Reputation Gold border, dark scumline, comic chaos.

cards.title: Trust Tessa
cards.one_liner: Trust is a receipt with a long memory.
cards.prompt: Trust Tessa stands beside another goblin, their hands joined by a sturdy lock engraved 100 Interactions. Nearby, a single-interaction chain is broken, its shattered lock labeled 1 Interaction. Tessa looks calm and the other goblin looks relieved. The background shows many clocks and calendars, emphasizing time and repeated cooperation. A tiny imp at the broken chain holds a sign reading Warranty void if context changes. Another imp engraves the main lock with higher numbers as time passes. Reputation Gold border, trust-chain overlay.
